auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Scrape.do API token passed as the token query parameter. Create or copy it from the Scrape.do dashboard.

actions.name: fetch_html
actions.description: Fetch one public URL through Scrape.do and return the synchronous response body.

url.description: The public target URL Scrape.do should request.

super.description: Whether Scrape.do should use residential and mobile proxy networks.

geoCode.description: The two-letter country code used for Scrape.do geo-targeting.

regionalGeoCode.description: The continent code used for Scrape.do regional geo-targeting.

render.description: Whether Scrape.do should render the page with a headless browser.

device.description: The browser device profile Scrape.do should emulate.

width.description: The browser viewport width in pixels.

height.description: The browser viewport height in pixels.

blockResources.description: Whether Scrape.do should block CSS, image, and font resources while rendering.

timeout.description: The maximum Scrape.do request timeout in milliseconds.

retryTimeout.description: The maximum Scrape.do retry timeout in milliseconds.

disableRetry.description: Whether Scrape.do should disable its retry mechanism.

disableRedirection.description: Whether Scrape.do should disable target request redirection.

setCookies.description: The Cookie header value Scrape.do should send to the target website.

customHeaders.description: Whether Scrape.do should handle all request headers.

forwardHeaders.description: Whether Scrape.do should forward caller headers to the target.

output.description: The Scrape.do output format for page content.

content.description: The response body returned by Scrape.do.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by Scrape.do.

headers.description: The HTTP response headers returned by Scrape.do or the target website.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by Scrape.do.

anyOf.description: The Scrape.do credit cost reported for this request.
The remaining Scrape.do credits reported after this request.
The response Content-Type header when returned.
The final response URL observed by the connector.

metadata.description: Metadata collected from Scrape.do response headers.

outputSchema.description: The response returned by a synchronous Scrape.do request.

actions.name: fetch_json
actions.description: Fetch one public URL through Scrape.do returnJSON mode and return the parsed JSON payload.

url.description: The public target URL Scrape.do should request.

super.description: Whether Scrape.do should use residential and mobile proxy networks.

geoCode.description: The two-letter country code used for Scrape.do geo-targeting.

regionalGeoCode.description: The continent code used for Scrape.do regional geo-targeting.

render.description: Whether Scrape.do should render the page with a headless browser.

device.description: The browser device profile Scrape.do should emulate.

width.description: The browser viewport width in pixels.

height.description: The browser viewport height in pixels.

blockResources.description: Whether Scrape.do should block CSS, image, and font resources while rendering.

timeout.description: The maximum Scrape.do request timeout in milliseconds.

retryTimeout.description: The maximum Scrape.do retry timeout in milliseconds.

disableRetry.description: Whether Scrape.do should disable its retry mechanism.

disableRedirection.description: Whether Scrape.do should disable target request redirection.

setCookies.description: The Cookie header value Scrape.do should send to the target website.

customHeaders.description: Whether Scrape.do should handle all request headers.

forwardHeaders.description: Whether Scrape.do should forward caller headers to the target.

output.description: The Scrape.do output format for page content.

showFrames.description: Whether Scrape.do should include iframe content when render and returnJSON are enabled.

showWebsocketRequests.description: Whether Scrape.do should include WebSocket requests when render and returnJSON are enabled.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching a Scrape.do returnJSON response.

data.description: The parsed JSON payload returned by Scrape.do.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by Scrape.do.

headers.description: The HTTP response headers returned by Scrape.do or the target website.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by Scrape.do.

anyOf.description: The Scrape.do credit cost reported for this request.
The remaining Scrape.do credits reported after this request.
The response Content-Type header when returned.
The final response URL observed by the connector.

metadata.description: Metadata collected from Scrape.do response headers.

outputSchema.description: The JSON response returned by Scrape.do returnJSON mode.

actions.name: get_account_info
actions.description: Retrieve Scrape.do account information and usage counters for the API token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Scrape.do account information.

is_active.description: Whether the Scrape.do subscription is active.

concurrent_request.description: The maximum concurrent request count for the account.

max_monthly_request.description: The maximum monthly request count for the account.

remaining_concurrent_request.description: The remaining concurrent request count for the account.

remaining_monthly_request.description: The remaining monthly request count for the account.

account.description: The account information and usage payload returned by Scrape.do.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for Scrape.do account information.

actions.name: take_screenshot
actions.description: Render one public URL through Scrape.do and return a screenshot as base64.

url.description: The public target URL Scrape.do should request.

super.description: Whether Scrape.do should use residential and mobile proxy networks.

geoCode.description: The two-letter country code used for Scrape.do geo-targeting.

regionalGeoCode.description: The continent code used for Scrape.do regional geo-targeting.

render.description: Whether Scrape.do should render the page with a headless browser.

device.description: The browser device profile Scrape.do should emulate.

width.description: The browser viewport width in pixels.

height.description: The browser viewport height in pixels.

blockResources.description: Whether Scrape.do should block CSS, image, and font resources while rendering.

timeout.description: The maximum Scrape.do request timeout in milliseconds.

retryTimeout.description: The maximum Scrape.do retry timeout in milliseconds.

disableRetry.description: Whether Scrape.do should disable its retry mechanism.

disableRedirection.description: Whether Scrape.do should disable target request redirection.

setCookies.description: The Cookie header value Scrape.do should send to the target website.

customHeaders.description: Whether Scrape.do should handle all request headers.

forwardHeaders.description: Whether Scrape.do should forward caller headers to the target.

output.description: The Scrape.do output format for page content.

fullPage.description: Whether Scrape.do should capture a full-page screenshot.

selector.description: A CSS selector for a partial screenshot area.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for taking a screenshot with Scrape.do.

imageBase64.description: The screenshot image encoded as a base64 string.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by Scrape.do.

headers.description: The HTTP response headers returned by Scrape.do or the target website.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by Scrape.do.

anyOf.description: The Scrape.do credit cost reported for this request.
The remaining Scrape.do credits reported after this request.
The response Content-Type header when returned.
The final response URL observed by the connector.

metadata.description: Metadata collected from Scrape.do response headers.

outputSchema.description: The screenshot response returned by Scrape.do.
